chapter_title.en: Chapter on Categories Upon Whom Zakat is Obligatory

text: 1608 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لَيْسَ فِي اَلْأَكِيلَةِ وَ لاَ فِي اَلرُّبَّى اَلَّتِي تُرَبَّى اِثْنَتَيْنِ وَ لاَ شَاةِ لَبَنٍ وَ لاَ فَحْلِ اَلْغَنَمِ صَدَقَةٌ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1608 - Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj reported from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"There is no Zakat on animals kept for personal consumption, on young animals raised for two years, on milking sheep, or on breeding rams."
